hero.title: The world's only OpenClaw repair software. With Yixiuge in hand, your OpenClaw stays worry-free.
hero.description: Even without technical skills, you can install it. Even without spending a cent, you can repair it. Install, use, repair, and uninstall — Yixiuge helps you finish everything in one go.

install.title: One-Click Install OpenClaw

card.title: Install OpenClaw Service
card.description: The AI assistant will step through system checks and automatically install and configure the OpenClaw service.

install.ready: Click the button below to start. The AI assistant will complete all steps automatically.

detectEnv.label: Detect system environment
detectEnv.active: Scanning OS, architecture, and installed software…

card.title: Uninstall OpenClaw Service
card.description: Select what to remove. The AI assistant will automatically handle uninstallation and cleanup.

stopServices.label: Stop services
stopServices.description: Stop the running OpenClaw gateway and remove its daemon

removePackage.label: Remove OpenClaw package
removePackage.description: Uninstall the openclaw CLI via npm/pnpm/bun

deleteConfig.label: Delete configuration files
deleteConfig.description: Remove openclaw.json, packs.json, and other config files

deleteData.label: Delete historical data
deleteData.description: Remove all remaining data in ~/.openclaw (agents, logs, credentials, skills, etc.)

stopServices.label: Stop services
stopServices.active: Stopping OpenClaw gateway and removing daemon…

quickFix.title: One-Click Repair OpenClaw
quickFix.description: Scan and fix common system issues with one click

scan.title: System Scan
scan.description: The AI assistant will automatically detect anomalies and list fixable issues.
scan.noIssues: All systems are running normally. No issues detected.

serviceStopped.name: OpenClaw service not running
serviceStopped.description: OpenClaw daemon has stopped and cannot respond to requests

configMissing.name: Configuration file missing
configMissing.description: config.yaml does not exist or is corrupted

certExpiring.name: SSL certificate expiring soon
certExpiring.description: TLS certificate will expire in 7 days

diskFull.name: Log directory low on space
diskFull.description: Log directory is 95% full, may affect service operation

cacheCorrupted.name: npm cache corrupted
cacheCorrupted.description: openclaw-related npm cache files are corrupted

custom.title: Custom Fix
custom.description: Describe your issue and the AI assistant will try to diagnose and fix it.
custom.placeholder: Describe the issue you're experiencing, e.g.: service keeps restarting, port occupied, database connection failed…

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDescription: Select the display language for the interface.
settings.themeDescription: Choose the appearance theme for the app.
settings.apiUrlDescription: The API endpoint for the model service.
settings.apiKeyDescription: The API key used for authentication. Keep it safe.
settings.modelDescription: Specify the model name to use.
settings.aboutDescription: OpenTaylor is a security operations tool providing OpenClaw installation & removal, quick fixes, and more.
settings.openclawDirDescription: OpenClaw metadata directory for storing config and data.
settings.gatewayTokenDescription: Authentication token for the OpenClaw gateway, auto-generated after installation.
settings.gatewayPortDescription: Port the OpenClaw gateway listens on.
settings.openclawBinDescription: Path to the OpenClaw executable. Leave empty to use the default from PATH.
